cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Hybrid offline agriculture assistant: ONNX CNN classifies coffee leaf images (healthy, Leaf rust, Phoma); GGUF LLM powers English advisories and an offline farmer chatbot; curated Kiswahili content on the same 8 GB laptop without cloud APIs.

test_prompts.prompt: A coffee farmer in Uganda sends a leaf photo showing yellow-orange powdery spots on the underside. What disease is likely present and what immediate countermeasures should they take?
In Kiswahili, advise a smallholder coffee farmer on early signs of Phoma leaf disease, prevention steps, and when to apply fungicides.
